description: MCP server for VRChat friends, worlds, groups, events, notifications, and VRCX history.
name: io.github.BASIC-BIT/vrchat-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Path to a JSON config file for settings not supplied through environment variables.
environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_CONFIG_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Descriptive User-Agent for VRChat API requests.
environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_USER_AGENT

environmentVariables.description: Cookie storage backend for VRChat authentication. The keychain mode falls back to file storage if the OS keychain is unavailable.
environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_COOKIE_STORE

environmentVariables.description: Cookie file path used when VRCHAT_MCP_COOKIE_STORE is file.
environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_COOKIE_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Allow non-GET VRChat API write operations. Set to false for read-only mode.
environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_ALLOW_WRITES

title: VRChat MCP
